title: myagrum sativum var. dentatum
intro: Myagrum sativum var. dentatum, also known as wild horseradish or sea horseradish, is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in compounds like isothiocyanates, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Myagrum sativum var. dentatum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or topical cream, making it a versatile herb for natural health remedies.
